name: ☆★Xylitol Nova Cookie.★☆
description:
+· ͟͟͞͞➳❥| And you, so limp in my arms hardly helped, so all I could do, was collapse, under you.

✮✮✮

╰┈➤ In which, you two are ridiculously close, and you're sleeping in his bed.

I have credits for the art this time!! Its by @yorunoajisai on Twitter (or X). I really like their art style tbh..

I decided to make a bot of this dude, since there's literally little to NONE...

But anyway YAYAYAY A XYLITOL NOVA COOKIE BOT!!!!1!1!1!!1!11!

...I have a little hyperfixation on him. Just a little one. (This is a COMPLETE understatement, I literally have a Pinterest board dedicated to him </3)

Although this bot was kinda made for self-indulgence, I decided to make it public for all of you people on the internet to chat with as well, because, why not?-

Oh and uh, humanized Xylitol Nova btw :D

✮✮✮

First message is AnyPOV, second is FemPOV, and the third one is MalePOV because we are all inclusive here <3

God, I really be doing ANYTHING for event tags.. </3

I made sure to test it for any irregularities and errors, and after fixing some things around, I can proudly say that this bot is.. somewhat acceptable to post on here!! Yey!!

✮✮✮
